subject: FW: flight time
body:
________________________________

From: LVJET@aol.com [mailto:LVJET@aol.com] 
Sent: Wednesday, April 09, 2008 10:38 AM
To: Rahna Jalashgar
Cc: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: flight time


FYI in case Je ask what flight time is in Gulfstream 6+50 min with ( +26
kt tailwind), requiring a fuel stop in  Gander Newfoundland  or Shannon
Ireland.  depending on weather forecast.
Lv
